completedActions.name: Create src/forma-list.ts as a mutator class (not encapsulated collection) with constructor(items, ItemClass, parentId?) that wraps an existing array reference, and CRUD methods: addItem(cfg) with auto-generated related ID (if parentId provided), deleteItem(id), getItem(id), patchItem(id, cfg), moveItem(id, {before?, after?}), items(filter?)
Implement Symbol.iterator for iterable support (spread syntax, for...of loops)

Add comprehensive JSDoc: class description with usage examples, method parameter/return docs, related ID generation behavior notes. Add Avro schema support if needed (following FormaCollection.schemaOf pattern)
Create test/forma-list.ts with: CRUD operation tests, iterable interface tests, encapsulation verification, fuzzy ID matching tests, related ID validation tests

name: Implement FormaList class

references.text: FormaList is a mutator class that wraps an existing array reference (not an encapsulated collection like FormaCollection). Constructor signature: (items, ItemClass, parentId?) where parentId is optional and third parameter. CRUD methods mutate the wrapped array directly.
src/forma-collection.ts - Reference implementation for CRUD pattern
src/identifiable.ts - For understanding FuzzyId and idFilter()

summary: Create FormaList mutation helper for Forma subclass arrays with CRUD methods and iterable interface
